g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does a developer do on the dev branch daily?')
sendPrompt('What automated checks run on every dev commit?')
sendPrompt('What happens when CI tests fail on dev?')
sendPrompt('How do I create a pull request from dev to qa?')
sendPrompt('What auto-deploys to the QA environment after merge?')
sendPrompt('Who approves the pull request from qa to master?')
sendPrompt('What is required before merging qa into master?')
sendPrompt('How does master auto-deploy to production?')

svg.text: commit to dev → CI runs → PR to qa → CD deploys to staging → PR to master → CD deploys to production
